text:
§4.2 Escalation and management
If the OHSS composite tier is HIGH, withhold the standard trigger and consider coasting, a GnRH-agonist trigger swap, or a freeze-all strategy, and escalate to the biologist. Reduce the gonadotropin dose by 75 to 150 IU where continued stimulation is indicated.

§3.1 OHSS composite score
Score one point each for estradiol >= 3000 pg/mL, >= 18 mature follicles, an estradiol rise >= 50% per day, and PCOS; a total >= 3 is a HIGH composite tier. A total of 2 is MODERATE; below 2 is LOW.
